channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Do indians post on this board? — 17 replies — 55.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Do indians post on this board?

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-25 19:45 UTC

OP

If not larp and ur legit w/ sharpie-in-the-poop/timetamped hands, please do an AMA. I have a curious.

Early replies (first 3)

62025460
>>62025457
saaar am poopjeet i shit on street saaar

62025470
>>62025460
Pls be posting the Sharpie saar you bluddy.

ALSO PLS NO REEDEEEM!!!!!

62025483
>>62025457
good morning sir

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025487
>>62025457
unironically this is the indian century. making my son study for hindi lessons, its gonna be important soon. we need to be able to compete

62025548
>>62025457
The world belongs to Dalits. We will enslave Brahmins and make them sanitation workers.

62025575
>>62025457
just asking that question cost me -50 izzat benchod

62025621
>>62025457

Go ahead AMA.

> verification not needed
> no use case for larping

62025624
There were literally an Indian shilling his services on /smg/ a week or 2 ago. Don't know if he still lurks here after the ban.

62025628
>>62025457
50% of the shitcoin shills
30% of the buy my bag shills
20% of the seething retards

62025644
>>62025457
i've been browsing /biz/ and joining /biz/ related telegram groups for two years
based on my experience, there are at least 2 indians constantly browsing here
one of them is severely mentally ill and the other one is pretty chill although super dumb and constantly falls for scams and rugs

62025651
>>62025457
West bengali sir here. I just had my streetfood dinner and im heading to the special street now

62025835
You know the world is ending when this subhuman scum it's at the helm. Not commanding the ship but asslickig those who do. Jam boys in a jam world.

62026679
>>62025487

62027235
>>62025575
>>62025548
>>62025487
>>62025624
>>62025644
>>62025651
god damn this became YLYL bake

thanks anons YOU BLUDDY BENCHOD BITCH BASTID!!!

62028748
>>62025457
Do you not know the story behind this ?

62028773
>>62025457
I was born in America

62032033
>>62028773
post timestamped hands or sharpie in the poop bro u know the rulez

item.title: UFC Betting — 10 replies — 35.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
UFC Betting

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-25 19:46 UTC

OP

I have realised I'm too dumb to do options trading and have 0 motivation and capital to invest seriously. Any money I put on the stock market will be a gamble anyway. So I got a Paramount subscription and am studying the body mechanics of fighters. It's really cool, you have the human element, you get to watch the fight with your money on the outcome which is exciting and you can do research into the fighters and study them mentally and physically. I have even started thinking about online bullying and harrassing the fighters I want to lose, I think I found a genuinely good hobby

Early replies (first 3)

62029808
>>62029627
Good goy. Lose your money doing degenerate gambling.

62029814
>>62029627
Gaethje is still breaking his own leg in the second round. Run from it, hide from it, the outcome is predetermined.
Also, buy a fucking ad.

62029992
>>62029814
How would you know that? There is no way the lightweights are throwing fights the way they are punching each other

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62030076
>>62029627
here ya go buddy:
>Topturo by R1 KO/TKO
>Pereira by Decision
>O'Malley (moneyline)
>Ruffy by KO/TKO inside 3
>Nickal (moneyline)
>Lopes (probably decision)
you're welcome

62030095
>>62029627
Can people actually make decent money off this?
lets say you put 500 on and win. how much would that be?

62030225
>>62030095
it depends

62030226
>>62030095
Prediction markets are usually $1 payout per contract, with contracts costing the % likelihood in ¢. 25¢ contract = 25% likelihood and $1 payout if true.

62032010
>>62030095
There are people who study body mechanics, i have been watching fights in super slow motion. Its a very primal sport, people naturally like and hate others for various reasons therefore you have biases, some people like or hate certain styles, fighters perform differently when fighting different opponents, the fighters get injuries and have personal issues like relationship failure or personal issues and how that makes them perform. So there is a whole host of things happening that can determine the outcome , race, age, height, experience, build etc. How good your personal strategy is upto you but it is a very human or primal thing in humans to take sides and to back the one you think will win.

62032028
>>62030095
If you put a 500 multi bet on the 3 heavy favorites to all win you get $1300 back

62032042
>>62030095
If you bet you 500 on all the underdogs winning that night and they all win, you get over 700k

item.title: SPACENIGGER MOONSHOTS — 3 replies — 6.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
SPACENIGGER MOONSHOTS

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-25 19:36 UTC

OP

How much of a pullback on this is meaningful? I already got burned by RKLB but I want to get in on this. I know PL is in bed with Space X but that's already too far gone for my taste. Is BKSY a reasonable alternative? Does "high-revisit" even matter? Is Europe ever going to try to defend itself?

Early replies (first 3)

62026919
You should have been buying RKLB in the $4 range. Hindsight is 20/20 but you can still buy MARS.

62031781
>>62026775
go all in all LUNR. 1 billion in added revenue after acquiring Maxar Technologies. Stock will do an easy 3x

62031993
>>62031781

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 142 replies — 180.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 142 • Updated: 2026-03-25 19:16 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62027559
>>62027084
I am under the impression that these hackathons garnered little attention and not many participants

62028035
>>62027559
In the tweet (https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2036502028281663860) it literally says
"
More than 260 teams and 850 hackers participated, building with Solidity on Polkadot Hub across EVM and PVM environments.
"
I'd say that's a big turnout for a hackaton with only a 31k$ prize, where the #1 place is literally just 3k$

62028040
>>62027559
pic related

62028045
>>62027559
https://dorahacks.io/hackathon/polkadot-solidity-hackathon/detail

62028099
>>62027559
By the way, good work Ram Sharma. Say more shit like that in order to make the thread look more organic. Our lord, Gavin Wood, will be very pleased about this and give us many DOTs. "More DOTs !!!"

62028411
100$ end of bull run

62028422
>>62028099
You called Gavin Wood a pedo

62029915
I see that halving worked out well.

62029950
>>62028422
Yes sir. He's the Web3 Epstein. He organized all of the meet ups. What do you think the Blockchain conventions are? They're literally pedo sex orgies.

>>62029915
>>61975396
>I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.

62029954
>>62028422
He's a cheese pizza connoisseur. He's a THE cheese pizza connoisseur. He likes to get in there and taste that pizza really good. He loves them hot out of the oven. He loves to lick them all over in order to mark his pizza slices and then go in HARD and DEEP. He loves to put his cream and sauce all over the last piece and then eat it out. MMMM, the taste of fine young cheese pizza with some sauce and cream on top of it.

62030077
>>62029950
I wasn't expecting an immediate skyrocket, but anything other than a clear downtrend and the worst performer in my portfolio this week.

62030292
>>62030077
Well, that sounds really tough on you. It must feel frustrating

62030357
>>62029950
>>62029954

How would this be good for business?

62030375
>>62030357
Well looks at Epstein. Rich and powerful people tend to love having cheese pizza and doing demonic sacrifices, therefore if we want to play like the big boys we need to host pizza parties in order to attract business

62030629
>>62030375
Not after the fact you've been caught

62030685
>>62030629
True, BUT only 2 people got caught and paid the price. Maxwell and Epstein. What about everyone else who got away with it? So what I'm trying to tell you is that CRIME IS LEGAL even if you get caught. If you're rich and powerful no police officer is going to do anything because they're just a modern day king's guards. Look at the history of the UK police department. The reason the police got created is to get the poor away from the rich. Don't believe me? https://jmmoore.org/2022/09/08/policing-the-poor-a-brief-introduction-to-patrick-colquhoun/

Bro, we live in a world where people PRETEND that kings and queens don't exist. They just masked themselves under the guise of "Presidents" and "tech company CEOs". These are your kings and queens and they do what the fuck they want. If they get caught they just start lying because most of the population is to deluded from Tik Tok and social media to even notice the lies.

62030706
>>62030629
So, if you want to actually "combat crime" then you should educated the police force. If you have weak minded people in the police force then no one is going to do a damn thing about fuck all, right? The police is just a bunch of cowards. That's literally the reason why a lot of them become police officers. They're such fucking cowards and small that they can't live with themselves, therefore they get the badge and with it the "authority" ego. They have 0 authority over their own lives and that's why they seek some kind of authority in their lives by getting the "authority" ego. Think about it. What kind of a person wants to be a police officer? Some guy who has 0 fucking control and then he gets control how? By becoming a police officer. Now he's go the authority of the country. He can't even control his NPD or BPD wife at home and now he gets a badge and suddenly his the big tough guy on the block. UNTOUCHABLE, while at the same time when he gets home his wife basically screams and bellittles him into the ground and he can't do fuck all, because he's a coward and emotionally inept. So, emotionally educated police officers or else no new age king will go to jail. First they'll have to "clean up" at home and settle things with the misses and then only after that they'll be capable enough to clean up their country

62030811
>>62030629
What I see in todays world is that we're going through a liminal time where people have really low EQs. YES, EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE. And because they don't know how to handle their emotions we're all getting fucked because of it. Think about it. If you're a police officers it causes A LOT of cognitive dissonance in your head if you say this sentence "The government that's paying me and I'm working for has a lot of corruption in it. If I go after them then it'll destabilize the country and therefore my own job. What should I do?". The amount of cognitive dissonance these people face is fucking unreal. This is where emotional intelligence plays a HUGE factor and until we get a grip on how emotions work we're all fucked. We all have emotions YET we don't teach Emotions 101 in schools. Emotions, psychology, how the mind works should literally be a course at every step of the way through your education. Dude, when was the last time you used mathematics? Be honest. Never. BUT WE ALL HAVE A FUCKING MIND AND EMOTIONS. Yet most people HAVE NO FUCKING CLUE HOW TO HANDLE THEIR MINDS AND EMOTIONS. And that's literally one of the BIGGEST REASONS why the world is going fucking nowhere. Bro, wake up. Everyone has a limbic system (emotional circuit) and no one knows how to handle his own emotions. It's probably literally the #1 challenge in the world today. Everyone's just psychologically speaking at about 15yo. Look around, we're all children. No one is grown up. Funny saying "Civilization is a nice thing. But it hasn't happened YET". So please guys, learn to handle your emotions and mind so that we can move on as a civilization. So, that we can protect our fucking children from organize grooming and pedo gangs. Please, grow up.

Look at the UK. On one hand you have people saying "We should be tolerant of other races" and on the other "Other races gang rape our children". That's COGNITIVE DISSONANCE. TO BE CONTINUED

62030817
>>62030629
If you've been spoonfeed shit about how we should be tolerant of others then it's fucking hard to say what? It's hard to say "Some people don't deserve tolerance" and it's not even tolerance bro. It's about us having the same degree of tolerance to immigrants than we have to our own people. If a gang of white people gangbangs a 10yo into the ground while holding a knife to her throat they should go to fucking jail. If a gang of Somalis gangbangs a 10yo into the ground while holding a knife to her throat they should go to fucking jail. Do you see how the level of tolerance is literally the same? Yet people have been brainwashed into accepting one and tolerating one, while not accepting the other. And I'm not even saying there's some crazy conspiracy behind it. It's just how people were taught to handle it. And then it causes huge levels of cognitive dissonance and then you get places like the EU where everything is cooked and immigrants are fucking shit up and everyone is being like "Oh, we just need to be more tolerable and it'll work out". Bro... Do you even see the world? It's all based on EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE.

62030898
>>61932834
WTF! Why isn’t DOT pumping??? I’m so tired of waiting

62030958
>>62030898
>WTF! Why isn’t DOT pumping??? I’m so tired of waiting
Did you buy?

62030975
>>62030958
I sold my house Dec 1 2024 and went all in on DOT when Trump got elected and we were all going to get rich when the National Crypto Reserve was going to happen and start a crypto arms race among nations. Instead my $130,000 turned into $9,250

62030981
>>62030975
Ah. I see your problem. You bought. Please sell so that we can pump.

62031390
>>62030685
Listen. Yes there's been a void of rational thinking/ and mentality of kids amongst adults. We can blame Jews or whoever.

However it's because people are so emotional is why Polkadot might never take off. People follow the herd/ take sides on issues/ easily manipulated. Once the general population and business see Gavin Wood was/is a pedo its done over with

62031533
>>62031390
>Once the general population and business see Gavin Wood was/is a pedo its done over with
You do realize the whole pedo thing is a joke, right? Just like with Sergey there's the "He's a fat whale piece of shit who always wears the same T-shirt" joke. You do realize I'm just saying shit to say shit? Saying Gavin is a pedo gives the coin more soul.

62031541
>>62031390
But yea. I agree that people follow social conformity over authentic individuality and that most people sell out their authenticity for conformity and belonging. Most people are asleep, even me and I've been trying to wake up for my whole life and I still believe I'm asleep in many cases. Being awake is a blessing and a curse at the same time and I would NOT change a thing. It's like. If I'm asleep I'll get cooked. If I'm awake I'll get cooked BUT I'll at least know I'm getting cooked and I can make my peace with that

62031581
>>62031390
And I'm not trying to say that social conformity is completely bad. What I'm trying to say is that both authentic individuality and social conformity can and do go to such extremes that it ends up in mentally unhealthy logic. Social conformity to the point where you get abused by your partner is mentally unhealthy. Authentic individuality to the point where you scream at everyone how retarded they are, because you see their faults, is again mentally unhealthy. We need to combine both and that's how you become WISE. You combine emotions with logic and you end up being balanced and what people tend to call a "Wise man". You can't be wise through sheer logic and you can't be wise through sheer emotions. A wise man knows what he can see to which person. He can see how far along the path a certain human being is and he can determine what will help him wake him up. If you're empathic you sense other peoples emotions and how pushy you can be. If you're smart you know what to say in order to wake the population up. Every sentence is either opening ones mind or closing it.

62031792
>>62031533
Right there though lies the core root. Social media, sites like this, take a joke whether true or not , do not research and spread the word around and people claim as true. Same shit with AI. It behooves me that people actually believe some 500 pound guy goes bungee jump, cord breaks loose and pummels to his death.

Goes back to rational thought. There's only so many people it seems that have a decent enough IQ to stop for a moment and actually fact check something they see or hear.

A very dangerous time for society

62031812
>>62031581
Too much consumption and interactions of what is going on in the world as breaded said behavior. Constant rage baiting, pulling at heart strings, does effect ones emotions

62031912
>>62031792
>Right there though lies the core root.
Do you really want people like that in your coin? If they can't detect the difference then I really don't need them.

>There's only so many people it seems that have a decent enough IQ to stop for a moment and actually fact check something they see or hear.
It's also an EQ thing, since not being manipulated is an EQ thing. Like when people say "Things just FEEL off", that's an emotions thing. You can easily manipulate high IQ people.

>>62031812
>Too much consumption and interactions of what is going on in the world as breaded said behavior. Constant rage baiting, pulling at heart strings, does effect ones emotions
I'd argue that yes it does do that and at the same time we're basically educating people what is manipulation and what isn't. Me for instance. I've been consuming the internet for literally about 19 years now, give or take. And because of that my brain is a bullshit detector. I've been on the internet soo much, I've seen soo much, that I can relatively easily detect lies and deceit because I've trained myself to be like "Does this look right? Could this be a lie?". Because there is soo much rage bait and emotional manipulation I've literally become accustomed to detecting it. We're the first internet generation and therefore we need to face these challenges. Every generation after us will be better at detecting bullshit and there will be less bullshit because of that. People will get more and more keen over time. I really do believe that

item.title: US is bankrupt — 41 replies — 58.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
US is bankrupt

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-03-25 19:21 UTC

OP

US is bankrupt

Early replies (first 3)

62026401
>borrow 40 trillion dollars
>spend it on building the most powerful military in history
>the debt collectors ask for the money back
>use your military to kill them

62026472
>>62026388
I voted for this

62026477
>>62026388
Powell should have lowered rates

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026869
>>62026388
>Liberal experts say "TRUMP IS DESTROYING EVERYTHING!"
OMG I GUESS I BETTER PANIC SELL EVERYTHING!!!!

62026880
>>62026660
Jaime Dimon same thing lmao
These economists are retards just guessing

62026914
>>62026477
the high rates are the sticky inflation

62026917
>>62026401
>spend it on building the most powerful military in history
Still waiting for that military

62027191
>>62026401
>Default on debt payments
>70% of bond holder are your own citizens and national companies

Ok retard

62027216
>>62026917
Fr. It's all mutts who wanted free education, and low iq white goyslaves who were born into "proud" veteran slave households. Our military is shit.

62027398
>>62026880
I remembered pointing out the tribe memebership of these tow authors to doomers back then. But they were too retarded tho antisemitic but the phrase that always comes is
>this time they are right

62027478
>>62026692
>>62027191
>he thinks the government cares about its citizens

62027523
>>62027222
Checked

62027536
>>62026401
Our military is a shadow of what it once was. It's certainly not WWII level, it's not even Bush 2 level anymore. Obama/Trump/Biden era killed what was left of the US military. A miltiary that exists solely to move money to favored donors and interests will inevitably atrophy and wither because all the blood is going to parasites. All that's left is a half-baked invasion of a foreign country before it all falls to ruin and people start snubbing us and people stop signing up without massive inflationary payments to entice people to enlist into a crumbling lockmart welfare program.

62027541
>>62026388
What does that even mean? So what they're never gonna stop spending until they have to

62027666
The world economy has been running on fumes since 2008
then they did the covid scam to steal money and try to turn society into chaos. Then they literally printed trillions overnight in 2020.
Everything after that is a slow descent to hell, and there's no escape outside of total destruction of the USA and europe

62028022
>>62026869
anon... he's the one who got into power using the debt as an argument lol

62028083
>>62027666
They’ll just reset the monetary system after they inflate everything away. It is absolutely guaranteed to happen; there’s no avoiding it now. No amount of growth or tightening the belt reverses this train. This is just yet another example of the reserve currency slowly collapsing due to easy debt. Fiat was really the white flag of surrender—it always is. See: Rome

62028121
>>62027478
You seem to think that “the government” exists as some entity immune from the collapse that follows the collapse of reserve currency status and the repudiation of public debt. The government is comprised of people who, for the most part, suffer in the advent that the bond market completely collapses and the USD needs to pegged to something stable. This absolutely happens if the government simply refuses to pay back bonds. “The government” loses most of its power in this scenario as well. There is no world in which the government “wins” while also repudiating their debt.

62028282
>>62026388
Nope. The USA has unlocked the Infinite Print Technique where you get to issue currency any old time you feel like it. Sure, it sucks for plebs but who cares about plebes, like at all?

62028316
>>62026388
this is so bullish for bitcoin and crypto.

62028462
>>62026401
>most powerful military in history
>gets embarrassed by Iran immediately

62028493
>>62027216
the military is just a social security program in disguise. social security is necessary, but it's not very palatable to right wing voters. instead of gibs, you make people push pencils around for a bit and then give them gibs. that way it's acceptable somehow

62028745
>>62028121
That's all well and good, but it didn't address the
>government doesn't give a fuck about its citizens
part

62028750
>>62026388
Good riddance

62029268
>>62026401
who is creditor I wonder
oh wait, it's you
lol
>>62027478
>BRO THE GOVERNMENT IS GOING TO SEND THE ARMY TO RAID PENSION FUNDS
you're not very bright

62029348
>>62026880
Dimon is a 110% counter.

62029550
And thank god for that right before they wanted to be wanna be nazis. Fuck the us the ayatolla is saying death to america beyond his grave.

62029565
>>62026388
Has been for at least a century.

62031490
>>62026813
>exporting a domestic good while the price skyrockets domestically
>here's why that's actually a good thing

62031838
>>62028007
>it's real
Fucking hell

62031930
>>62028745
The implication of your post is that the government will still tell the public to fuck off and refuse to pay the debt via military might because they don’t care about the citizens. Sure, they might not care about citizens, but it doesn’t matter; it’s in the best interest of the government (and the citizens who work for it) for the bond market to stay afloat. Your post was retarded, basically.

item.title: it's over — 65 replies — 30.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
it's over

Open thread • Replies: 65 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:53 UTC

OP

They're going to rugpull the entire US economy

Early replies (first 3)

62020090
I think they can keep the plates spinning for another decade, maybe two.

62020123
>$64 trillion baked in
Fucking hell

62020245
eh I wouldn't worry about it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025587
>>62020044
this has been said for 50 years dude. nothing will happen.
>2030
>omg us debt is 549 trillion it's gonna collapse any second now!!!

62025623
OH MY GOD, THE US DEBT IS INCREASING, THIS IS UNHEARD OF

62025633
>>62020361
>her

62025647
>entire economy is based on debt
>90% of debt is owed to the US
if you are worried about the debt you are fucking retarded

62025861
>>62020555
Not a comforting comparison for several well-known reasons.

90% of Japanese government debt is held domestically — by Japanese banks, insurance companies, pension funds, and the Bank of Japan itself. This means Japan is essentially borrowing from itself, so there's no foreign creditor pressure, no currency flight risk, and little chance of a sudden foreign selloff. US debt by contrast has significant foreign ownership (China, Japan, and others hold large portions), making it more vulnerable to geopolitical pressure.

The BOJ owns an extraordinary share of Japanese government bonds through decades of quantitative easing. A government effectively owing money to its own central bank is categorically different from owing it to external creditors.

Japan is the world's largest net creditor — it owns more foreign assets than foreigners own Japanese assets. This means the gross debt figure is offset by enormous foreign holdings.
The US by contrast is the world's largest net debtor nation.

Also, Japanese government debt is held at very low interest rates. But the US is moving at an accelerating pace towards the point where the interest on the debt alone exceeds all revenue.

And Japanese households have traditionally maintained very high savings rates, providing a large domestic pool of capital to absorb government debt. In the USA, on the other hand, the people are up to their eyeballs in their own personal debt and are defaulting at an accelerating pace.

So the USA is actually far more fucked by its debt than Japan.

62027225
>>62025539
Great innit?

My mom was somehow simultaneously a feminist AND a religious christian in highschool so she had double the reasons to cockblock me in every way possible. Missed out on teen pussy because of that psycho.
>BUT WHY ARE YOU SO MENA TO ME NOW SON
SHUT THE FUCK UP BITCH, DON'T CALL ME WHEN I'M DRIVING HOME FROM WORK AT 10 PM BECAUSE I HAVE 3 JOBS

62027228
>>62025647
>>62025861
The US won't collapse, it will jack up taxes on (You) and everyone younger to get back their money, because hte debt was taken out against the future generations.

62027274
>>62020044
this is good

62027392
>>62020044
A debt crisis doesn't necessarily mean the economy goes kaput. They can just inflate the debt away if need be. If the US Gov buys assets like Gold for $5000 and then decides that they are going back to a gold standard where Gold = $10,000 suddenly they have doubled their money, but really they just made the currency worth half as much. This helps with debt though because the debts are still at face value so they can just sell the gold back at the new prices and pay the debts.

Now imagine instead of making it that obvious they buy a bunch of gold at $5000 and then over the course of some years they allow it to rise to $50k. That is 10x and doesn't technically seem like a devaluation occurred, but the assets owned by the government suddenly exceed their liabilities so the government is solvent again.

Even if they don't plan on doing this if the government needs to pay for something really bad they can just print so this might end up happening without any plan for it to happen. Even technically speaking all the scrap steel in the navy might eventually be an asset worth more than all the debt used to pay for it if a commodities go up in price sufficiently.

The problem is that a commodity boom is terrible for the rest of the economy because everyone who needs anything needs to pay the high commodity prices

62027459
>>62024927
g8 b8 m8
the brainwashing no longer works lmao
death to israel

62027463
let's just forgive all debts and move on

62027480
>>62020044
Why did the Supreme Court do this?

62027500
>>62020044
See you bros at the rations line

62027547
>>62025047
US salaries are good though? I mean the whole reason people get paid more here versus some place like Japan is primarily due to inflation.

62028397
>>62020090
Everybody stopped breeding. All industrial and post industrial societies all over the world stopped breeding. There is going to be a giga crash in anything requiring young people in the next 40 years. It likely won't get too bad until the Boomers die off in the 2040's. Life is going to get old and slow for a lot of people all at the same time.

62028408
>>62025522
Kvetching kike is kvetching

62028545
>>62027547
Keep inflating and devaluing the USD against other currencies and you'll see how those 6 figure salaries become comparable to minimum wage in other developed countries.
>>62025647
>90% of the debt is owed to Americans
>one day, the government is just no longer capable to pay the tumorous interest anymore
That's not the own you think you had, anon. There's no free lunches in economics. One day, someone will have to pay the bill.

62028951
>>62028408
why do you love muslims so much?

62029004
>>62020044
It's fine. will just print more money. we can and will print our way out of this scenario

62029911
>>62020044
who’s they?

62029938
>>62029911

62030093
>>62028951
>btfo repeatedly
>*changes argument*
Sad!

62031267
>>62029911
jews

62031352
>>62025861
>90% of Japanese government debt is held domestically
Chat estimated that US debt is 75-80% domestically held.. So it isn't that different from the situation in Japan.

62031376
>>62027392
>They can just inflate the debt away if need be.
The issue is that most of that debt is held by Americans, you "inflate the debt away", that's someone's pension you just made disappear.
There are no accounting gimmick or brutal way out of it..

62031383
Money is a wholly man-made concept. It doesn't matter.

62031391
>>62031383
yeah, we invented money because a barter economy has some real issues i.e. coincidents of mutual wants.
so unless we want to go back to a barter economy, then we need money and it does matter.

62031392
>>62024312

When interest on the debt exceeds all revenue. Probably sooner than you think.

Assumptions: Revenue grows 3.5%/yr (10-yr trend). Spending grows 5.5%/yr (recent trend). All debt — existing and new — rolls over or is issued at 4.3% (current blended market rate). Annual deficit added to debt each year. Starting debt: $36T (FY2024).

Under these assumptions, the model projects interest payments exceed all federal revenue around 2042 — roughly 16 years from now.
A few things worth noting about what the model shows:
The compounding trap. The reason it happens so fast is self-reinforcing: each year's deficit gets added to the debt, which generates more interest, which widens the deficit further, which adds more debt. It's a debt spiral — the same dynamic that destroys household finances, just at sovereign scale.
The crossover is actually worse than it looks. When interest alone exceeds all revenue, the government would still need to fund Social Security, Medicare, defense, and everything else — meaning it would have to borrow 100% of non-interest spending plus interest it can't cover. At that point the only options are default, hyperinflationary money printing, or a catastrophic fiscal restructuring.
The model is arguably optimistic in one respect — it assumes the interest rate stays at 4.3%. In reality, as debt spirals and creditors lose confidence, rates typically rise, accelerating the timeline.
What could change the trajectory:
• A sustained primary surplus (spending cuts + revenue increases) — politically very difficult
• Strong GDP and revenue growth outpacing spending
• A sharp drop in interest rates (the Japan scenario)
• Debt restructuring or default
The CBO's own projections, while less aggressive in their assumptions, tell a similar directional story — just stretched out slightly further. None of the serious fiscal analysts dispute the direction, only the timeline.

62031482
>>62024312
>what's the breaking point?
there isn't one
that's the funny part

62031487
>>62025522
uh oh
kvetchy maldy melty

item.title: Job Market KMS — 19 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Job Market KMS

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-03-25 18:30 UTC

OP

Nah fr what the fuck do I have to do to get a fucking job man.

i'm not here to just vent and woe is me blah blah blah but I swear to god my path leading up to this point has only put me at a disadvantage.

went to an ivy league school bc I got a massive scholarship, felt compelled to as people where I'm from don't get that opportunity all that often.

Still had to wait tables to house and feed myself. No time for internships.

Graduate 2020. Perfect timing.

Do what I need to do to make ends meet.

Laid off recently.

No company will give me the time of day unless theres an alumni there.

'underqualified' for most listings bc of unconventional path 'overqualified' for any other job to just make ends meet

95% of job listings are fake.

Fuck me.

Need legit tips. Somewhere to look I haven't thought of, someone's dick I need to suck. Should I start selling drugs?

Early replies (first 3)

62030385
>>62030360
Find a skill people will pay you for. Stop thinking about what you want; think about what your prospective employer wants.

62030397
>>62030385
genius. plenty of skills are had, the issue is finding where to apply them.

62030414
are you a jeet that fell for the cs meme?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62030415
>>62030360
This is the worst job market probably in modern history. Information is being manipulated at high levels. If you find something stable you better hang on.

62030438
>>62030360
feels good that I didn't even go to school, never looked for a job, and still retired by browsing /biz/

62030444
>>62030414
no on both counts. i studied/have worked in advertising/marketing. Lots of soft skills, sales, coordination, building systems, planning campaigns. That type of shit.

62030446
>>62030397
>plenty of skills
That’s good to hear, but no employer offering the type of job you want is looking for a jack of all trades. Everyone has basic communication skills and knows how to use excel. What single niche skill do you have that you’ve put 10,000 hours into?

62030449
>>62030415
bro fucking tell me about it. Stable to me at this point means even a fucking retail job. Can't even find that.

62030455
>>62030360
This is probably on purpose. Let the golem struggle ultra hard so that they cherish their golem position once they finally get it and dont try no funny business.

62030458
Think if everyone was dumb asf. They wouldnt want s soda theyd want a giga big fucking soda, theyd want burgers the size if basketballs. Theyd want a stripper to serve them along with some weed or beer and then theyd go to the shooting range. The next day theyd see some monster trucks and then some ufc.
Well?

62030472
>>62030446
the 'type of job i want' is literally anything that pays. Not looking for a career. Frankly, anything utilizing the skills that I have put thousands of hours into is a waste of time, i.e., diminishing returns. Those things that make me 'special' would be better utilized building something myself. But I digress.

I'm talking about the fact that it seems like I can't even get a job at fucking Starbucks lol

62030488
>>62030360
it took me a year and a half and i got lucky some mid 30s burned out had a midlife crisis so now i have a sick job. my advice is redo your resume with ai. focus it on a skill like: regulation, leadership, analytics, instrumentation..etc.

62030495
>>62030472
I’m sorry to hear you’re having such trouble finding a job anon. I hope you consider my advice if a year goes by and you still can’t find a good position.

62030539
>>62030360
Yeah anon I know, I'm sorry. I too graduated with a bachelors into 2020. Fortunately for me I was the recipient of some nepotism. It's pretty bleak out there rn. I legit think people are soon going to have trouble affording food. Idk what to do about it.

62030905
>>62030360
I moved across the country, booked Airbnb, got security guard job, used offer letter to get cheap apt, then got promoted to supervisor literally for just showing up on time everyday and being polite and friendly to my account manager.

In this supposed HCOL city I’m doing completely fine. Rent is $820, total monthly living expenses are about $1600 on the high end

If you can’t find a job it’s because you suck ass

62030957
>>62030360
See if ULINE has anything for you

62030977
>>62030360
getting a job is impossible now. I applied to 30 positions with less experience and a bachelors years ago and got a job with only two interviews

now im at 300 applied with one interview

62031000
>>62030449
same even retail jobs ghost, its kinda wild. But when i walk into any of these retail or shit jobs its filled with mexicans who dont speak english

its insane

62031647
>>62030472
you're either going to rape yourself to build skills or get raped in shitty job because you have no skills.

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:48 UTC

OP

Assuming the war wraps up within the next month with either a total Iranian victory and Trump chickening out and returning to status quo ante, or a marginal US victory with Iran being forced back into the cuckshed with shipping returning to normal, what are the chances that we see a recovery on the back of massive inflation, as happened during the Covid lockdown?

None, the covid recovery was made through mass money printing. They won't turn the printer on to that scale unless things are very bad.

62024739
Inflation already going to happen , energy prices contribute to the price over everything and energy will not get cheaper despite bussyant trying to artificially lower the futures price of oil.

62024740

item.title: ETERNAL REMINDER: PRECIOUS METALS ARE NOT INVESTMENT — 20 replies — 7.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
ETERNAL REMINDER: PRECIOUS METALS ARE NOT INVESTMENT

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-25 17:25 UTC

OP

Consider this a PSA for all the spiritual dwarves in /biz/ scamming people into buying rock collections.

For all you have insulted my crypto, your rock collection is rugging harder than the worst of them. PMs is such a bad investment, it loses to Pokémon cards for any time period.

Eternal reminder:
>the bottom of Bitcoin is 65k
>the bottom of Gold is 10 dollars
>Fed ends the silver
>ETFs and treasury bonds outperform PMs without a fraction of the stress and mental illness
>Gold cannot be used to buy groceries, therefore it is useless
>your PMs are not even real, they are a company paper promissing you that the metal exists

PMs provide nothing, besides an accurate metric of how much market leverage is in the hands of the mentally unwell.

Early replies (first 3)

62027469
Oi m8 u betr get ur swarthy daemon handz off mi glittery bits or i''ll rek u sware on me mum

62027555
>>62027446
Who the fuck are you? Captain save a dwarf?

62027581
metals are inverse of oil yawn next

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62027914
>>62027446
>>your PMs are not even real, they are a company paper promissing you that the metal exists

62027925
>>62027446
>you're only up 115.90% over a year

62028487
have sex

62028566
have sex

62028614
The reason people hold metals is because they're hedging on the slight chance of an inflationary run away that wont ever recover. The chance of that happening in our lifetimes or our kids lifetime should match the amount you should hold compared to your entire net worth, which is 5%.

The people who bet their entire lives on a massive economic collapse for America are the same who bought the propaganda of a nuclear war against the USSR. People here who preach about the inevitable collapse of America are off about 300 to 1300 years.

It's common sense, wether you like it or not that if America falls, there will be a millenia of darkness much like the roman empire collapsing.

You won't be saved by hoarding silver or gold. Because Zuckerberg's and Bezos' paid militias will find and ass rape you just for the fun of it. Nazi Germany was successful at parting the jews with their gold forcibly. The Ottoman and Persian empire was successful with enslaving the people they conquered.

This time is different because we're at the tipping point where 24/7 surveillance and robotic agents will enforce a top down rule, possibly forever.

The poors back then were able to revolt because you can't easily replace soldiers, and weapons were an even playing field.

The poors today will have no ability to even fight against sound weapons and soldiers equipped with helmets that can predict enemies behind a wall. Much less robots that will be mass produced for 20k a unit.

The clown show has to keep going until robotic agents leave the proof of concept phase and into production.

62028697
Lick my gold veiny throne OP. I am going into that mineshaft hard and fast. No time to grease those cart tracks.

62028756
>>62027446
Wait, what now?

62028759
>>62028614
>The people who bet their entire lives on a massive economic collapse for America are the same who bought the propaganda of a nuclear war against the USSR.
These are nowhere close to the same situation. One was the result of relentless propaganda aimed at cowing its populace, the other is a narrative the current ruling regime is actively propagandizing against because objective public data supporting that conclusion exists and is obvious.
>You won't be saved by hoarding silver or gold. Because Zuckerberg's and Bezos' paid militias will find and ass rape you just for the fun of it.
They're gonna be too busy fucking their wives' corpses and raiding the pantries of the doomsday bunkers they were hired to protect.
>The poors today will have no ability to even fight against sound weapons and soldiers equipped with helmets that can predict enemies behind a wall. Much less robots that will be mass produced for 20k a unit.
I am a defense contractor and literally all of that is a scam. The US has some mighty weapons but you managed to somehow highlight all of the biggest vaporware projects in the MIC. My Gell-Mann amnesia is completely erased and I can confidently say you have not a single fucking idea about anything you're talking about, and you should shut up now.

62028819
>>62028759
>I'm a totally real defense contractor on an anonymous image board filled with pakistanis and Somalians saar
>Therefore fuck you saar

Great debate there sanjeet. Anyone who tries to butter up their rhetort with an appeal to authority should have their balls lobbed off for using such a brain dead take.

If you were actually a military contractor you would've kept that part quiet and actually had a real point. And yes, silver and gold hoarders are on the same levels of nuclear war scizos.

62029773
Imagine being dumb enough to fall for the gold scam.

Did you really think that you were investing, anon? The rocks are thousands of years old, they won't get more valuable.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JThlN-NX1Dw

62030306
>>62028819
>Your opinion as a professional who works in this space is now le "appeal to authority"
You know what absolutely gives a reply zero authority and zero meaning? Reddit spacing like a third world newfag that just found this site yesterday on his telegram, you stupid fuck.
Not everyone is a minimum wage loser like you, quit projecting and gave fun working a register today while I'm banging booth girls.

62031024
>>62028697
Sure, enjoying working McDonald's once you are done getting scammed.

>>62028614
This is accurate, except it believes PM holders actually have any sense of what their position means. In reality, they are just treating PMs like it is bitcoin, but hoarding it like a rock collection in the mineshaft.

>>62029773
That gold is a scam is a tale as old as civilization itself, but people keep falling for it.

62031031
>>62027446
Holy based

62031189
>>62027446
>stop buying silver goy
>central banks conspire to crash it, therefore it is worthless

62031196
>>62027446
>why would you want to hold wealth outside the bank?
>you should keep everything in a digital account

62031355
>>62031024
Bought most of my gold and silver years ago. Even sold some when it was high. But I did buy a wee bit on the way down into the dip last Friday. I don't care if it goes up or down right now. You aren't getting floored soon Crimex. Should have thought about that when Wormtongue told people to sell everything and put it all in cash. What if not everybody wants all their wealth in cash? Should have left a safe heaven somewhere else if you don't like it.

item.title: My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m… — 26 replies — 5.2/hr

OP

62024372

62024374

62024382
>>62024371
Look here look listen! Listen pimp, you should probably get out of the position

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024384
>>62024372

62024404
>>62024371

62024457
I dont understand why people who do these Long or short trades would ever do it with money they can't afford to lose. If you lose all your money you deserve it, hope you don't though, but you're a dumbass either way.

62024467
FUCK FUCK FUCK

62024477
>>62024467
post positions

62024481
>>62024467
Close it and long oil 20x to make your losses back and more! You've got this!

62024624
>>62024467

62024770
>>62024481

62024963
BOOM!

62024979
OP are you alive my nigga

62025027
>>62024371
Lose it all...and next time don't be a dumbfuck.

62025035
>>62025027
>>62024979

He already got double tapped. OP is dealing in the real world, right now.

62025052
>>62024371
thanks for playing

62025070
>>62024371

You were too ugly and awkward to ever get laid anyway. Thanks for playing.

62025130
Bitcoin barely dropped enough to liquidate OP. Feels personal. Like they just wanted OP's money, in particular.

The leverage game is rigged. I'd be pissed.

You pissed OP?

The jews took your money.

62025137
>>62024371
Not make bets like this.

62025141
>Longs the actual literal top of a 5% candle with his life savings using 50x leverage
Either a total larp or your money is in a better place now

62025151
>>62025141
does 50x leverage make you gay or jewish?

62026511
No...

62029919
OP you actin like a lil bitch right now.

62030020
>>62024371
>I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get
you can always work another month at mcdonalds to get it back

62030022
>>62024481
all it takes is another orange lie to get your anus licked by a giant red dildo

62030813
>>62024467
Take that cock like a good girl mumu
